blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,995 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 12°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
